title: Remove, inspect and fit earthmoving and off-the-road tyres
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove, inspect and fit earthmoving and off-the-road tyres demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess and control risks

pcs.text: Identify and control hazardous conditions in the work environment1.2 Identify and apply safety requirements to control hazardous tyre, wheel and rim assembly conditions, noting points where safety checks are required1.3 Obtain and interpret emergency procedures and be prepared for fires, accidents and emergencies1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks, and implement control measures in line with workplace policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and control hazardous conditions in the work environment1.2 Identify and apply safety requirements to control hazardous tyre, wheel and rim assembly conditions, noting points where safety checks are required1.3 Obtain and interpret emergency procedures and be prepared for fires, accidents and emergencies1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks, and implement control measures in line with workplace policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and control hazardous conditions in the work environment1.2 Identify and apply safety requirements to control hazardous tyre, wheel and rim assembly conditions, noting points where safety checks are required1.3 Obtain and interpret emergency procedures and be prepared for fires, accidents and emergencies1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks, and implement control measures in line with workplace policies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess and control risks

elements.title: Prepare to remove tyre from wheel or rim

pcs.text: Obtain and interpret manufacturer procedures original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications, workplace procedures, and applicable standards for earthmoving and off-the-road tyres2.2 Obtain, interpret, clarify and confirm work requirements2.3 Plan sequence of work, noting points where safety checks are required2.4 Select and wear personal protective equipment required for the work activity2.5 Coordinate and communicate planned activities with others at the site as per work requirements2.6 Identify tyre, wheel and rim components2.7 Select and inspect tools and equipment according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures2.8 Prepare, clean and inspect tyre, wheel and rim assembly for damage, wear, corrosion, foreign material, cracks, and compatibility of component
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and interpret manufacturer procedures original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications, workplace procedures, and applicable standards for earthmoving and off-the-road tyres2.2 Obtain, interpret, clarify and confirm work requirements2.3 Plan sequence of work, noting points where safety checks are required2.4 Select and wear personal protective equipment required for the work activity2.5 Coordinate and communicate planned activities with others at the site as per work requirements2.6 Identify tyre, wheel and rim components2.7 Select and inspect tools and equipment according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures2.8 Prepare, clean and inspect tyre, wheel and rim assembly for damage, wear, corrosion, foreign material, cracks, and compatibility of component?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and interpret manufacturer procedures original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications, workplace procedures, and applicable standards for earthmoving and off-the-road tyres2.2 Obtain, interpret, clarify and confirm work requirements2.3 Plan sequence of work, noting points where safety checks are required2.4 Select and wear personal protective equipment required for the work activity2.5 Coordinate and communicate planned activities with others at the site as per work requirements2.6 Identify tyre, wheel and rim components2.7 Select and inspect tools and equipment according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures2.8 Prepare, clean and inspect tyre, wheel and rim assembly for damage, wear, corrosion, foreign material, cracks, and compatibility of component.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare to remove tyre from wheel or rim

elements.title: Deflate and remove tyre from wheel or rim

pcs.text: Isolate, jack, raise and support vehicle according to workplace procedures3.2 Deflate tyre according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures3.3 Verify appropriate deflation of tyre in line with workplace procedures and OEM requirements3.4 Apply workplace procedures for the safe removal and purging of hazardous fill substances 3.5 Remove tyre according to workplace procedures and without causing component damage or injury
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Isolate, jack, raise and support vehicle according to workplace procedures3.2 Deflate tyre according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures3.3 Verify appropriate deflation of tyre in line with workplace procedures and OEM requirements3.4 Apply workplace procedures for the safe removal and purging of hazardous fill substances 3.5 Remove tyre according to workplace procedures and without causing component damage or injury?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Isolate, jack, raise and support vehicle according to workplace procedures3.2 Deflate tyre according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures3.3 Verify appropriate deflation of tyre in line with workplace procedures and OEM requirements3.4 Apply workplace procedures for the safe removal and purging of hazardous fill substances 3.5 Remove tyre according to workplace procedures and without causing component damage or injury.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Deflate and remove tyre from wheel or rim

elements.title: Inspect tyre, wheel or rim and recommend repair and replacement actions for unserviceable components

pcs.text: Clean and visually inspect tyre, wheel or rim for serviceability and compatibility for application according to workplace procedures and OEM specifications4.2 Record and report inspection findings according to workplace procedures4.3 Document recommended repair and replacement actions and report to relevant personnel according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and visually inspect tyre, wheel or rim for serviceability and compatibility for application according to workplace procedures and OEM specifications4.2 Record and report inspection findings according to workplace procedures4.3 Document recommended repair and replacement actions and report to relevant personnel according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and visually inspect tyre, wheel or rim for serviceability and compatibility for application according to workplace procedures and OEM specifications4.2 Record and report inspection findings according to workplace procedures4.3 Document recommended repair and replacement actions and report to relevant personnel according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Inspect tyre, wheel or rim and recommend repair and replacement actions for unserviceable components

elements.title: Fit tyre to wheel or rim

pcs.text: Access and interpret workplace procedures and OEM specifications for fitting tyres5.2 Assess need for tyre additive and nitrogen and add where required5.3 Fit tyre according to workplace and manufacturer procedures5.4 Perform post-fit inspections of tyre, wheel and rim assembly according to workplace procedures to confirm correct assembly, component compatibility, serviceability, and correct seating of components prior to inflation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and interpret workplace procedures and OEM specifications for fitting tyres5.2 Assess need for tyre additive and nitrogen and add where required5.3 Fit tyre according to workplace and manufacturer procedures5.4 Perform post-fit inspections of tyre, wheel and rim assembly according to workplace procedures to confirm correct assembly, component compatibility, serviceability, and correct seating of components prior to inflation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and interpret workplace procedures and OEM specifications for fitting tyres5.2 Assess need for tyre additive and nitrogen and add where required5.3 Fit tyre according to workplace and manufacturer procedures5.4 Perform post-fit inspections of tyre, wheel and rim assembly according to workplace procedures to confirm correct assembly, component compatibility, serviceability, and correct seating of components prior to inflation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Fit tyre to wheel or rim

elements.title: Inflate tyre

pcs.text: Identify and apply tyre inflation safety procedures6.2 Inflate tyre for transport, storage or use according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications6.3 Monitor tyre, wheel and rim assembly during inflation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply tyre inflation safety procedures6.2 Inflate tyre for transport, storage or use according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications6.3 Monitor tyre, wheel and rim assembly during inflation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply tyre inflation safety procedures6.2 Inflate tyre for transport, storage or use according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications6.3 Monitor tyre, wheel and rim assembly during inflation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Inflate tyre

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Perform final inspection to ensure work meets workplace requirements and OEM requirements7.2 Prepare tyre, wheel and rim assembly for use or storage according to workplace procedures7.3 Inspect and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures, tagging or reporting where necessary7.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform final inspection to ensure work meets workplace requirements and OEM requirements7.2 Prepare tyre, wheel and rim assembly for use or storage according to workplace procedures7.3 Inspect and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures, tagging or reporting where necessary7.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform final inspection to ensure work meets workplace requirements and OEM requirements7.2 Prepare tyre, wheel and rim assembly for use or storage according to workplace procedures7.3 Inspect and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures, tagging or reporting where necessary7.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E7: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
